summary: Frontend-only testing of the new collapsible categorized sidebar in FletchFlow. All 14 navigation pages load correctly. Sidebar displays 4 collapsible categories (Operations, Plan Management, Claims Center, Network & Groups) with proper expand/collapse functionality, chevron rotation animation, sub-item indentation with left border, and active state highlighting. Settings link visible for admin users. Sidebar width constant at 256px.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts still render correctly

passed_tests: ✅ Login with demo@fletchflow.com / Demo123! works correctly
✅ Sidebar displays 4 collapsible categories: Operations, Plan Management, Claims Center, Network & Groups
✅ Operations auto-expands when on Dashboard page
✅ Dashboard is highlighted as active with dark background (bg-[#1A3636])
✅ Category headers have toggle buttons with chevron icons
✅ Chevron rotates 90° when category is expanded (rotate-90 class)
✅ Sub-items are visually indented with left border (border-l class)
✅ Active parent category is highlighted (text-[#1A3636] bg-[#F0F0EA])
✅ Settings link appears below categories with border separator for admin users
context_for_next_testing_agent: The collapsible sidebar navigation has been fully implemented and tested. All 4 categories (Operations, Plan Management, Claims Center, Network & Groups) work correctly with expand/collapse functionality. The sidebar uses data-testid attributes: nav-category-{id}, nav-toggle-{id} for categories, and nav-{item-name} for sub-items. Settings is a standalone admin footer item. All 14 navigation pages load correctly.

sidebar_verification.active_highlight: bg-[#1A3636] text-white for sub-items, text-[#1A3636] bg-[#F0F0EA] for parent category
